heading: Our Services
subheading: Professional mahjong experiences for every occasion

services.title: Office Workshops
services.description: Team-building sessions designed for the workplace. Break the ice, build connections, and give your team a fresh way to unwind together. We send out invoices and accept payments through stripe and credit card.

services.title: Business Collaborations
services.description: Collaborate with us for branded events, pop-ups, and cross-promotions. We work with businesses, brands, and organizations to create memorable mahjong moments.

services.title: Private Lessons
services.description: One-on-one or small-group instruction tailored to your pace. Perfect for beginners learning the basics or players refining their strategy. We'll teach you how to play with points.
